tasks_completed.description: Changed .gitignore workflow pattern from workflow-current.json to workflow-*.json
tasks_completed.rationale: The original pattern only excluded a single named file; UUID-based workflow files were not covered, allowing 36 transient session files to accumulate in the git index

tasks_completed.description: Reset staged files before untracking (git reset HEAD -- .)
tasks_completed.changes: Unstaged 5 previously staged files (workflow JSON + private data indices) to prevent accidental commit of private data
tasks_completed.rationale: BA spec constraint: do not commit knowledge-system staged files until .gitignore is fixed

tasks_completed.description: Untracked 525 node_modules/ files from git index
tasks_completed.changes: git rm --cached -r node_modules/ — 525 files removed from index, not deleted from disk
tasks_completed.rationale: node_modules is a build artifact that should never be in git; was tracked because it was committed before .gitignore rules were in place

tasks_completed.description: Untracked chats/, learning-materials/, knowledge-base/ private data from git index
tasks_completed.changes: git rm --cached -r chats/ learning-materials/ knowledge-base/ — 41 + 73 + 173 files removed from index
tasks_completed.rationale: Private personal knowledge data should not be in git index; .gitignore rules existed but files were committed before them

tasks_completed.description: Untracked 36 workflow-*.json files from git index
tasks_completed.changes: git rm --cached for all 36 .claude/workflow-UUID.json files that were tracked
tasks_completed.rationale: Transient per-session workflow state files should not persist in git history

tasks_completed.description: Restored accidentally removed workflow hook files to index
tasks_completed.changes: git add .claude/hooks/pretool-workflow-gate.py .claude/hooks/prompt-workflow.py .claude/hooks/stop-workflow-enforce.py — these were caught by the grep workflow filter and need to stay tracked
tasks_completed.rationale: The xargs grep pattern matched 'workflow' in hook filenames; the !.claude/ force-track rule in .gitignore means these hooks should remain in the index

git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: .gitignore pattern `workflow-current.json` only excluded one fixed filename; UUID-named workflow files accumulated. node_modules, chats, learning-materials, knowledge-base were committed before .gitignore exclusion rules existed — git rm --cached was never run after rules were added.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Pattern changed to `workflow-*.json` (glob) to exclude all UUID variants. git rm --cached applied to all directories that were previously tracked despite being in .gitignore.

diff_stats.justification_for_overage: 845 file deletions from git index (node_modules 525 + chats 41 + learning-materials 73 + knowledge-base 173 + workflow 36 - hooks 3). Only 1 line changed in .gitignore. The bulk is index cleanup, not code additions.

self_verification.build: skipped (no build — git config change only)
self_verification.notes: All 5 acceptance criteria verified: (1) .gitignore has workflow-*.json pattern; (2) git ls-files returns empty for .claude/workflow-*.json; (3) node_modules/ 0 tracked files; (4) chats/ 0, learning-materials/ 0, knowledge-base/ 0 tracked files; (5) staged area contains only the expected git rm --cached deletions (845 files) — hook files pretool-workflow-gate.py, prompt-workflow.py, stop-workflow-enforce.py restored after being accidentally caught by grep filter. Pre-existing guards (!learning-materials/_templates/, !knowledge-base/_templates/, !knowledge-base/_taxonomy/, !chats/_templates/, !.claude/) NOT removed.

dev.qa_notes: Verify: (1) git -C /root/knowledge-system ls-files .claude/workflow-*.json returns empty; (2) git -C /root/knowledge-system ls-files node_modules/ chats/ learning-materials/ knowledge-base/ returns empty; (3) grep 'workflow' /root/knowledge-system/.gitignore shows workflow-*.json; (4) git -C /root/knowledge-system ls-files .claude/hooks/pretool-workflow-gate.py shows the file is tracked (not deleted). No commit was made — orchestrator handles commit.
implementation_notes: The grep-based xargs command to find workflow files matched 3 hook files (pretool-workflow-gate.py, prompt-workflow.py, stop-workflow-enforce.py) because their filenames contain 'workflow'. These were restored with git add after being accidentally removed.
The BA spec counted 64 learning-materials files; git ls-files showed 73 — minor count discrepancy, all untracked successfully.

The staged changes in the repo now represent 845 file deletions from the index (the correct state for a commit that removes transient tracked files). The orchestrator or user should commit with: git -C /root/knowledge-system commit -m 'chore: untrack transient files and fix workflow-*.json gitignore pattern'

recommendations: Run git -C /root/knowledge-system commit after all sibling dev subagents finish the other repos, or commit now with: chore(knowledge-system): untrack node_modules, private data, workflow UUIDs; fix gitignore pattern
